hero.title: Earn a British Bachelor's Degree from the DRC
hero.subtitle: The complete 4-year academic pathway, delivered 100% via distance learning. Commence your foundation year immediately upon receiving your Diplôme d'État, and graduate with a UK Bachelor's degree without the burden of travel or visa costs.

journey.title: Your 4-Year Academic Pathway
journey.subtitle: Complete your entire British Bachelor's Degree without leaving the DRC.
journey.subtitle2: From the Examen d'État to a British Degree — A structured pathway aligned with the RQF framework.

foundation.title: The International Foundation Year
foundation.subtitle: Your gateway to British higher education — master academic English and university-level study methodologies in a single academic year.
foundation.benefit1_desc: Bypass costly external language tests. Our curriculum embeds rigorous academic English training, precisely equipping you for UK university standards.
foundation.benefit2_desc: Upon successful completion of this foundation year, you automatically secure your progression to Year 1 of the Bachelor's programme (Level 4) — eliminating application uncertainty.
foundation.benefit3_desc: The Foundation Year is seamlessly integrated into our continuous 4-year pathway. Validate this initial stage and progress naturally to your final British Bachelor's degree.

curriculum.title: Foundation Year Syllabus
curriculum.subtitle: Explore the six core modules of your first year. A rigorous curriculum designed to elevate your academic competencies to the standards of top UK universities.

pathway_detail.title: The British Degree Delivered to You
pathway_detail.subtitle: Study Intelligently. Optimise Your Investment. Earn a British Degree — From the DRC.
pathway_detail.description: Complete the entirety of your UK degree in the DRC through our innovative distance learning model — saving you over $142,000 in tuition, living costs, and travel expenses.
pathway_detail.year0_desc: Build your academic English and study skills with our DRC Hub and full online access to UK materials.
pathway_detail.year1_desc: Begin your UK programme. Study online with weekly in-person support at our DRC Hub.
pathway_detail.year2_desc: Continue your studies from home. Access live lectures, recorded content, and local academic advisors.
pathway_detail.year3_desc: Complete your final year fully online to UK university standards. Graduate with an authentic British degree without leaving the DRC.

scholarship.title: The Excellence Scholarship
scholarship.subtitle: Up to 20 full-ride scholarships for our inaugural cohort.
scholarship.description: We cover 100% of your tuition fees and your internet data for all 4 years. Reserved for the brightest minds in the DRC with an average above 70%.
scholarship.criteria_2: Under 25 years of age at the time of application
scholarship.note: Create your profile on Admitta to verify your eligibility. Application fees are exceptionally waived for our Inaugural Cohort.

why_choose.title: Why Choose Ignito Academy?
why_choose.subtitle: World-class UK education seamlessly integrated with local accessibility.
why_choose.benefit1_desc: A structured pathway aligned with the official RQF framework, ensuring world-class academic standards.
why_choose.benefit2_desc: Complete your studies from your home country with comprehensive online resources and academic support.
why_choose.benefit3_desc: Advance at your own pace, allowing you to successfully balance rigorous academic pursuits with personal commitments.
why_choose.benefit4_desc: Benefit from our localised academic facilitation team, providing on-the-ground guidance throughout the DRC.

final_cta.title: Your British Degree Commences Here
final_cta.subtitle: Applications for the September 2026 academic intake are now officially open. Submit your portfolio today to secure your enrolment.
final_cta.note: Application fees are exceptionally waived for our Inaugural Cohort. Create your profile in just two minutes.

footer.description: A distance learning centre offering British degree pathways aligned with the RQF framework, accessible from the Democratic Republic of Congo.
